flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University-Daytona Beach rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.1k → $44.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University-Daytona Beach rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.1k → $44.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University-Daytona Beach fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University-Daytona Beach are 77% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($84.1k vs $47.6k).
